subcategory: 3D globe visualization with markers and connection arcs
use_cases: Displaying global data distribution and geographic metrics across regions
Visualizing network connections between international office locations
Showing real-time data flows or user distribution worldwide
Representing logistics or supply chain routes on a global scale
Illustrating market penetration or customer locations for analytics dashboards
ai_summary: An interactive 3D globe component that renders geographic markers and animated arc connections between locations. Supports auto-rotation, customizable colors for dots, arcs, and markers, with configurable connection paths. Built for dashboards and data visualization platforms needing to display global metrics or network topology across geographic regions.
